repo_prior_art.cite: No catalogue duplicate; stat_pn_weak_event_honest_inference concerns rare factual-event PN/PS ratios, not a CAR illness-death stochastic-intervention EIF.

published_prior_art.cite: MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased supplies fixed-window illness-death EIF inference; SchindlShenKennedy2024IncrementalContinuous supplies static continuous-exposure effective-sample-size results; neither gives the proposed CAR multistate bounded-count marked-Poisson limit.

repo_prior_art.cite: No catalogue duplicate; stat_pn_weak_event_honest_inference studies an honest-diameter frontier for rare PN/PS ratio shells, not Hölder regularization of an exact initiation-time survival target.

published_prior_art.cite: ArmstrongKolesar2020HonestCI and AiHuangZhang2026UniformContinuousTreatment give nonparametric continuous-target inference tools, but neither treats a learned CAR illness-death EIF or its bounded-effective-count replacement experiment.

soundness_flags.label: def:model-class, def:no-censoring-subclass, and target_estimand
soundness_flags.one_line: Both law classes range over observed-data P while their load-bearing causal-validity member condition and headline equality use an unquantified P_full; define a paired full/observed model or explicitly quantify compatible extensions and prove extension-invariance.

soundness_flags.label: ass:no-censoring-subclass
soundness_flags.one_line: The cited KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE paper is a Hölder CATE model, not a censored-survival lower-bound source, so it does not support the stated censoring-specific standard tag.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:observed-hazard-causal-validity and both open-ended questions
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Causal correspondence between the observed-filtration hazard intervention and the full-filtration intervention is assumed, not derived from observed trajectories.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: All causal and inferential headlines are conditional on an explicitly specified compatible full-data extension satisfying observed-hazard causal validity.

source_verification_receipts.verified_claim: The paper distinguishes full- versus observed-filtration interventions, states exact-time non-pathwise differentiability, and derives an observed-data EIF and one-step asymptotic normality for a smoothed illness-death intervention.
The paper studies exponentially tilted static continuous-exposure interventions and gives effective-sample-size n/delta minimax and estimator-rate results.
Theorem 2.1 gives Gaussian approximation to suprema of empirical processes under its measurability, moment, and entropy assumptions.
The paper constructs bias-aware honest nonparametric confidence intervals and analyzes efficiency and bandwidth choice.
The paper develops weighted local-linear continuous-treatment estimation, uniform Bahadur representations, bootstrap confidence bands, and data-driven bias control.
The paper gives kernel-localized cross-fitted doubly robust inference for average dose-response functions under high-level nuisance conditions.
The cited article studies minimax estimation of Hölder-smooth conditional average treatment effects; it is not a censoring or survival lower-bound model.
The paper gives cross-fitted doubly robust treatment-specific survival inference with pointwise and uniform asymptotic linearity under nuisance conditions.
The paper studies global and local dose-response estimators and a higher-order influence-function estimator with upper mean-square-error bounds.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the observed-law-only model classes by a pair class (P_full,P), or state the existential compatible-extension quantifier and an explicit invariance lemma before defining theta(P).
Retag ass:no-censoring-subclass as an uncited submodel construction or cite a survival/minimax lower-bound source that actually supplies the intended reduction.

Turn the Gaussian branch into a precise first-result theorem target: name a primitive inverse-information/conditional-overlap condition, state the resulting bandwidth range and limit law, and distinguish it from the bounded-count construction.

For the honest-inference branch, commit to a concrete testing/modulus family and state the candidate diameter order or a named structural exponent, rather than leaving the frontier entirely qualitative.

recommended_next_step: Revise the full-data/observed-data model semantics and the unsupported no-censoring standard citation, then retain the two open kernels for Stage 0 review.
